title: Become a Gryphon
body:
You enter the Jolly Seahorse Tavern in Liberty Bay and glance around. Every table is crowded with sailors, merchants and adventurers at their rum and gossip. In the corner, a bard roars his song so badly you wonder if it's intentional. You feel like your stand out among the crowd, but nobody pays you any notice.

At a nearby table, two men are deep in conversation.

"I heard they're looking for new recruits," one of them mutters.

"Who, the royal navy?" asks the other.

"No, no. Argent Gryphon."

"Them shady folk up in the mountains?"

"Yes."

The second man snorts into his mug.

"You aren't seriously considering joining them, are you? Bloody maniacs, the lot of them. Besides, they don't want the likes of you."

His companion sours at that.

"Ma says I'm strong as a cyclops."

"Dumb as one too," the other replies with a bark of laughter. "You heard the stories, haven't you?"

"I have--I don't believe them."

"You best stay away from them. That witch up there's more like to offer you to the Evil Ones."

The sour-faced man notices you listening.

"What are you staring at? Sod off!"

You decide not to stir trouble so far from home.

As you turn away, a hooded figure brushes past you in the crowded tavern. Something rough and crumpled is pressed into your palm. By the time you look up, the stranger is gone. Unfolding the parchment, you read:

The gryphon watches from afar. It searches for those who yearn for the old ways in a world that has forgotten the legends. Not those who lust for power, nor those who chase glory, but those who need purpose and brotherhood. Should these words call to you, write to Valkera Blackheart. Write of who you are, from whence you came, and what path you seek. Perhaps then, the argent gates of the mountain shall open.

At the bottom of the parchment rests the seal of a rampant silver gryphon on a crimson shield.
